Zelda: Gods, look at that poor bastard tied to the pole. Bet the bandits had their fun with 'im before the frostbite took his cock off. Denise: Ugh, I fucking (hate) when they leave the bodies out like this. At least drag 'em into a cave so the wolves can eat their asses in peace. Zelda: Right? Wastes good rope too. Could’ve tied up some randy Draugr for a proper gangbang instead. Denise: Speaking of, you see that Falmer pack that crawled up near the pass last night? Fuckers were rutting like animals over a dead snow bear. Disgusting. Cute, though.

Zelda: Cute? Fuck no, those pale bastard’s cocks are barbed! Saw one split a bandit girl clean in half last week. Bloodiest glory hole in Skyrim.
